## Review Checklist

### Author

- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] No console.logs, debug code, or TODOs left behind
- [ ] New/changed env vars documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Database changes have a migration (`npx prisma migrate dev`)

### Functionality

- [ ] Tested locally (dev server)
- [ ] Edge cases handled (empty states, errors, loading)
- [ ] Works on mobile viewport

### Security

- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] User input is validated/sanitized
- [ ] API endpoints check authentication and authorization
- [ ] No SQL injection, XSS, or CSRF vulnerabilities introduced

### Accessibility

- [ ] Interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- [ ] Images have alt text, icons have aria-labels
- [ ] Color is not the only indicator of state
